testcase.name: test_teacher_list_no_hourly_rate

failure.message: AssertionError: hourly_rate found for teacher teacher_001 assert 'hourly_rate' not in {'average_rating': 4.9, 'bio': "Experienced Quran teacher with 10+ years specializing in Tajweed and memorization. Hafiz with Ijazah in Qira'at Asim.", 'commission_rate': 0.3, 'hourly_rate': 80.0, ...}

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_hourly_rate_removal.py:66: in test_teacher_list_no_hourly_rate assert "hourly_rate" not in teacher, f"hourly_rate found for teacher {teacher.get('teacher_id')}" E AssertionError: hourly_rate found for teacher teacher_001 E assert 'hourly_rate' not in {'average_rating': 4.9, 'bio': "Experienced Quran teacher with 10+ years specializing in Tajweed and memorization. Hafiz with Ijazah in Qira'at Asim.", 'commission_rate': 0.3, 'hourly_rate': 80.0, ...}

testcase.name: test_admin_users_no_hourly_rate

failure.message: AssertionError: hourly_rate found in teacher_info for ustaz.ahmad@alilm.com assert 'hourly_rate' not in {'average_rating': 4.9, 'bio': "Experienced Quran teacher with 10+ years specializing in Tajweed and memorization. Hafiz with Ijazah in Qira'at Asim.", 'commission_rate': 0.3, 'hourly_rate': 80.0, ...}

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_hourly_rate_removal.py:96: in test_admin_users_no_hourly_rate assert "hourly_rate" not in user["teacher_info"], f"hourly_rate found in teacher_info for {user.get('email')}" E AssertionError: hourly_rate found in teacher_info for ustaz.ahmad@alilm.com E assert 'hourly_rate' not in {'average_rating': 4.9, 'bio': "Experienced Quran teacher with 10+ years specializing in Tajweed and memorization. Hafiz with Ijazah in Qira'at Asim.", 'commission_rate': 0.3, 'hourly_rate': 80.0, ...}

testcase.name: test_teacher_profile_update_ignores_hourly_rate
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_hourly_rate_removal.py:126: in test_teacher_profile_update_ignores_hourly_rate assert response.status_code == 200 E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code
